title: Amtech S5100 100 Piece Assorted Rivet Set
features: DURABLE: This 100 piece assorted rivet set has rust proof aluminium heads with strong steel shanks
VERSATILE: Housed in a handy plastic storage case, the set includes assorted sizes that fit all standard hand and air riveters
EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: From the manufacturer Amtech S5100 Assorted Rivets, 100-Piece Assorted size rivets housed in a handy plastic storage case 25pc 3.2 x 6.3mm 25pc 3.2 x 8mm 25pc 3.2 x 10mm 25pc 3.2 x 16mm About us Amtech is a DK Tools brand and the company has been established for over 30 years. We started life as a family run market stall in London and now our know-how has been optimised across our vast range of tools for the home, garage and garden. We pride ourselves on assisting our customers with their do-it-yourself decision making process, because we are passionate about offering the right tools at the right prices. Our business has been built over the years on the foundations of our 3 core company values, Honesty, Integrity and Trust.

specifications_table.Style: ‎25 of each: 3.2 x 6.3mm; 3.2 x 8mm; 3.2 x 10mm; 3.2 x 16mm
